---
title: ""
pagetitle: "The Hamstrings — Atlanta Cover Band"
title-block-banner: false
---

```{=html}
<div class="hero-section">
  <img src="images/hero-mural.jpg" class="hero-bg" alt="The Hamstrings">
  <div class="hero-overlay">
    <img src="images/logo-white.png" class="hero-logo" alt="The Hamstrings logo">
    <div class="hero-tagline">Atlanta's cover band</div>
    <a href="mailto:hamstringsatl@gmail.com" class="hero-cta">Book us for your next event</a>
  </div>
</div>
```

```{=html}
<div class="upcoming-section">
  <h2>Upcoming Shows</h2>
  <p>More shows coming up… check back soon!</p>
  <a href="shows.html" class="hero-cta">View Full Schedule</a>
</div>
```

```{=html}
<div style="text-align:center; padding: 2rem 1rem;">
  <img src="images/eddies.jpg" alt="The Hamstrings at Eddie's Attic"
       style="max-width:700px; width:100%; border-radius:4px;">
</div>
```

```{=html}
<div class="booking-section">
  <h2>Book Us</h2>
  <p>Want The Hamstrings at your next event?</p>
  <a href="mailto:hamstringsatl@gmail.com" class="hero-cta">Get in Touch</a>
</div>
```
